violations.description: COLD AND HOT STORAGE EQUIPMENT (4 pts): Cold holding unit in the facility being used for cold holding temp of 41 degrees F was not functioning adequately. Breakfast pizza assembly reach in cooler noted above 41 degrees F.
TEMPERATURE MEASURING DEVICES (1 pts): Reach in cooler noted with no thermometer.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Some vent covers in the kitchen and in the kitchen walk in cooler noted in need of cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Some equipment exteriors noted in need of cleaning.
PREMISES (1 pts): Mops and brooms not hung.
